race.description: Happy 84th Birthday Anne Richardson Mdn Plate
race.comment: HELL'S ON FIRE (11) has gone under narrowly in her past couple, beaten a head two back before a 0.3L defeat at Strathalbyn most recently. Out to 1600m here looks a good move and the inside draw should see her get every chance in the run. Knocking on the door and finds a winnable race again today. OR AM I (14) gets the blinkers on for the first time today and comes here third-up off a short break. Drawing out wide may suit her a bit better with her racing pattern and out to 1600m is a bonus. On the quick turnaround here and can put her best foot forward. SWEET KICK (9) won't be far away if she can get back to her best out in distance today. LUDINA (13) is next best.
